C-1.title: Review gate infinite loop

evidence.consecutive_failures: 3 consecutive failures trigger PyBreaker circuit breaker -> returns 'fail' (attempts 1-2 return 'retry', attempt 3+ returns 'fail')
evidence.alternating_pass_fail: Alternating pass/fail resets breaker but hard ceiling at attempt 5 still triggers 'fail' (attempts 1-4 alternate retry/pass, attempt 5 returns 'fail', attempt 6 returns 'fail')
evidence.hard_ceiling: attempt_counts.build >= 5 returns 'fail' regardless of review_result or breaker state

C-1.notes: Original test script expected attempts 1-4 to return 'retry' but that assumed non-consecutive failures. With all-fail inputs, PyBreaker opens at 3 consecutive failures (by design). Alternating test confirmed hard ceiling works independently.

C-3.title: v1 tests moved, v2 agent tests work

evidence.v1_tests_relocated: 14 v1 test files found in tests/v1/ directory
evidence.no_v1_imports_in_root: grep returned empty - no v1 imports (pipeline_state, pineapple_audit, pineapple_config, pineapple_verify) found in root tests/test_*.py

summary: All 3 critical fixes verified WORKING via runtime execution. 98 tests pass (45 agent + 53 integration). No fake/stubbed behavior detected.
